title: Horizontal Card Dark
description: Dark ATI styling for reusable horizontal cards.

styles.css: &{overflow:hidden;padding:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);transition:box-shadow 300ms ease;} &:hover{box-shadow:var(--wp--preset--shadow--300)!important;} & .horizontal-card__body{padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);} & .horizontal-card__details{border-top-style:none;border-top-width:0;border-bottom-style:none;border-bottom-width:0;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--0);} & .wp-block-cover,& .wp-block-post-featured-image{overflow:hidden;} & .wp-block-cover .wp-block-cover__image-background,& .wp-block-post-featured-image img{transition:transform 300ms ease;} &:hover .wp-block-cover .wp-block-cover__image-background,&:hover .wp-block-post-featured-image img{transform:scale(1.05);} & .wp-block-post-featured-image img{border-radius:var(--wp--preset--border-radius--100);} & .wp-block-post-title a,& .wp-block-post-title a:hover{color:var(--wp--preset--color--base);} & :where(.wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt a,.wp-block-post-excerpt__more-link,.wp-block-post-terms a,.lsx-info-value a,p a):not(.wp-block-button__link){color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand-500);} & :where(.wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt a,.wp-block-post-excerpt__more-link,.wp-block-post-terms a,.lsx-info-value a,p a):not(.wp-block-button__link):hover{color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand-300);} & .wp-block-outermost-icon-block .icon-container{color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand-500)!important;} & .wp-block-outermost-icon-block svg{fill:currentColor!important;} & .wp-block-button__link{padding:0;background-color:transparent;color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand-500);box-shadow:none;text-transform:none;text-decoration:none;} & .wp-block-button__link:hover{background-color:transparent;color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand-300);} & .wp-block-button__link:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--wp--preset--color--brand-500);outline-offset:2px;}
